query: SELECT s.id, s.name, COUNT(*) as total_vendas, SUM(sa.points) as total_pontos, GROUP_CONCAT(sa.points ORDER BY sa.id) as pontos_individuais FROM sales sa JOIN sellers s ON sa.sellerId = s.id WHERE sa.status = 'approved' GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY total_vendas DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 72z9zwCQQTtJjjC.7f634d589b23 --database NKs9YYU4Bt79zUwnWH56wx --execute SELECT s.id, s.name, COUNT(*) as total_vendas, SUM(sa.points) as total_pontos, GROUP_CONCAT(sa.points ORDER BY sa.id) as pontos_individuais FROM sales sa JOIN sellers s ON sa.sellerId = s.id WHERE sa.status = 'approved' GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY total_vendas DESC;
